title: Collinsonia australis
intro: Collinsonia australis, also known as Australian stone root, is a plant species native to eastern Australia and New South Wales. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in relieving symptoms of arthritis, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Collinsonia australis contains bioactive constituents such as triterpenoid saponins, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant are teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support joint health, digestive function, and immune system balance.
